title: VPI - vpiFile returns wrong information
body:
Hello,
  I have a simple VPI based Lint code at: https://github.com/svenka3/ivl_uvm/blob/main/ivl_uvm_vpi/ivl_vlog_lint/check_name.c

When I run on Windows/Msys2 I found that vpiFile returns module name than file name. Interestingly (and luckily) vpiLineNo works fine. 

Code snippet:

```c
/* Get the file where module is decalred */
  file_name = vpi_get_str(vpiFile,argHandle);

```

Is this a known limitation? 

Thanks
code_blocks:
/* Get the file where module is decalred */
  file_name = vpi_get_str(vpiFile,argHandle);
